# @platform/adapters-loki

Loki adapter package for read-only structured log search via LogQL (operator log search backend, ADR-0035).

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/adapters-loki
Version: 0.1.0
Component: adapters-loki
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: loki-runtime
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: adapter
Class: active.adapter
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Build LogQL queries from structured log-search criteria
- Query the Loki HTTP query_range API and parse structured results
- Expose a read-only log-query port for the BFF admin log search API

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not ingest or push logs (Alloy owns ingestion per ADR-0035)
- Does not own log retention or storage configuration
- Does not render React components

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Consumed by apps/platform-api for GET /api/admin/logs/search (platform.logs.read)

## Boundaries

### Allowed consumers

```text
adapter
api-runtime
platform
```

### Forbidden consumers

```text
react-runtime
ui
feature
domain
contract
```

### Depends on

```text
None
```

```text

log-search
```

### Consumes APIs

```text
loki-query-range-http
```

## Operational notes

- High-cardinality fields (requestId/traceId/tenantId/actorId) are queried as JSON filters, never Loki labels, per ADR-0035 label policy
